title: IFB FTB-2627-00076 Genesys Software Subscriptions and Application Support Services
name: Genesys Software Subscriptions and Application Support Services
statement_of_work: The California Franchise Tax Board (FTB) is seeking to contract with a vendor to renew and procure various Genesys Software Subscriptions and Application Support Services (i.e. Professional Services) in support of FTB's Enterprise Service Platform II Contract Center Platform (CCP). Last Day to Submit Final Bids is May 29, 2026, by 5:00 PM Pacific Time (PT). The Event End Date of June 30, 2026, allows FTB to post the Notice of Intent to Award on this advertisement.
deliverables: Provide helpdesk or call center software
description: The California Franchise Tax Board (FTB) is seeking to contract with a vendor to renew and procure various Genesys Software Subscriptions and Application Support Services (i.e. Professional Services) in support of FTB's Enterprise Service Platform II Contract Center Platform (CCP). Last Day to Submit Final Bids is May 29, 2026, by 5:00 PM Pacific Time (PT). The Event End Date of June 30, 2026, allows FTB to post the Notice of Intent to Award on this advertisement. Question and Answer Set uploaded to advertisement.

unspsc_codes.description: Business function specific software - Helpdesk or call center software
